subject: docs(user-actions): record backend bypass coordination + Vercel env var step
body:
Backend commit tool-till-tees@5110d86 landed the two-gate sancio bypass
(call-site opt-in + SANCIO_AUTH_BYPASS env var) with 25 sancio call
sites opted in, 5 non-sancio call sites left JWT-only, and 8 passing
tests covering the full matrix.

The Vercel env var setup is owner-only — Claude can't touch the Vercel
dashboard. Added a new USER_ACTIONS.md entry at the top covering:

- Why the bypass exists and why the env var is the "second gate"
- Exact Vercel step (project → Settings → Environment Variables,
  value SANCIO_AUTH_BYPASS=true scoped to all three environments)
- Verification steps (DevTools network check + scoping validation
  against a four-ems forms endpoint still returning 401)
- Removal path for first real release — coordinated both-sides flip
  (frontend AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED=false, backend env var removal, and
  optional follow-up PR to delete the backend bypass code entirely)

Also cross-referenced the pre-existing "Re-enable authentication"
entry below with the coordinated-flip requirement so whoever picks
this up at release time can't miss the both-sides step.

No code change. Docs only.

Tags: docs, auth, coordination, user-actions
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
